description: INTSIG is a company behind products including CamScanner, CamCard, TextIn, and business data services. It provides document scanning/OCR and enterprise data products for consumer and business use.
summary: intsig.net exposes one confirmed public integration surface: the CamScanner MCP server at https://openai-apps.intsig.net/mcp. Other INTSIG/CamScanner business API pages found were marketing or application pages and did not provide a verifiable public API endpoint, spec, CLI, or auth mechanism on intsig.net.
